scenarios.description: visitor null triggers IllegalArgumentException at entry (r0 == null)
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Element("div");

scenarios.description: root null triggers IllegalArgumentException at entry (r1 == null)
single node with no children calls head and tail once (childNodeSize<=0, depth 0)
scenarios.precondition: visitor collects calls into list; no mocking needed
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head invoked with (root,0); visitor.tail invoked with (root,0)
pseudocode: List<String> calls = new ArrayList<>(); NodeVisitor visitor = (n,d)->calls.add("head:"+d);

scenarios.description: two-level tree descends and ascends properly (one child, depth increments to 1)
scenarios.precondition: tree root->child; visitor records head/tail; no mocks
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("p"); root.appendChild(child);

scenarios.description: sibling replacement inside head triggers replace branch (origSize==new size)
scenarios.precondition: visitor.head replaces node with clone; uses real DOM behavior; stub visitor replaces current node without changing sibling count
scenarios.expectedResult: continue traversal with replaced node at same index; head and tail invoked on replacement
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element a = new Element("a"); root.appendChild(a);
public void head(Node n,int d){root.replaceWith(new Element("x"));}

scenarios.description: removal in head triggers removal branch (origSize!=new size)
scenarios.precondition: visitor.head removes node; real removal behavior; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: node removed and traversal skips tail for removed node
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element a = new Element("a"); root.appendChild(a);

scenarios.description: elements empty list yields zero iterations (hasNext false)
scenarios.expectedResult: no exception; traverse is never invoked on individual elements
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = (n,d)->{}; Elements els = new Elements();
assert true; // no heads or tails called

scenarios.description: elements with multiple entries invokes traverse per element until exhaustion
scenarios.precondition: Elements contains two distinct Element roots; visitor records calls
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head and tail called for each element in sequence twice
pseudocode: Elements els = new Elements(new Element("a"), new Element("b"));
assert calls contains head/tail for "a" then head/tail for "b";

scenarios.description: assertion disabled path avoids AssertionError when z0 true ($assertionsDisabled=true)
pseudocode: Set -ea disabled; visitor noop; root leaf node;

scenarios.description: root=leaf triggers immediate return after tail (node==root branch in B20)
scenarios.precondition: single leaf node; visitor records calls
scenarios.expectedResult: head and tail called then return
